ant_colony.name: ant_colony
ant_colony.desc: Baseline: nest at centre, three food discs; dual-pheromone recruitment.

ant_colony_s1.name: ant_colony_s1
ant_colony_s1.desc: Baseline, seed 1: a different realization of the same dynamics.

ant_colony_s2.name: ant_colony_s2
ant_colony_s2.desc: Baseline, seed 2: a different realization of the same dynamics.

ant_decay_008.name: ant_decay_008
ant_decay_008.desc: Decay 0.008: trails persist -> thick, long-lived network.

ant_turn_020.name: ant_turn_020
ant_turn_020.desc: Turn 0.20: weak steering -> loose, wandering trails.

ant_turn_070.name: ant_turn_070
ant_turn_070.desc: Turn 0.70: strong steering -> tight, committed trails.

ant_turn_090.name: ant_turn_090
ant_turn_090.desc: Turn 0.90: very sharp turns -> nervous, kinked trails.

ant_sensor_d03.name: ant_sensor_d03
ant_sensor_d03.desc: Sensor dist 0.03: short reach -> ants hug the trail.

ant_sensor_d09.name: ant_sensor_d09
ant_sensor_d09.desc: Sensor dist 0.09: long reach -> ants lock on from afar.

ant_sensor_a30.name: ant_sensor_a30
ant_sensor_a30.desc: Sensor cone 0.3 rad: narrow -> follows the trail centre.

ant_sensor_a12.name: ant_sensor_a12
ant_sensor_a12.desc: Sensor cone 1.2 rad: wide -> exploratory, fuzzy trails.

ant_n080.name: ant_n080
ant_n080.desc: Small colony (80 ants): slower discovery, sparser trails.

ant_n200.name: ant_n200
ant_n200.desc: Large colony (200 ants): faster discovery, denser network.

ant_n260.name: ant_n260
ant_n260.desc: Huge colony (260 ants): rapid recruitment, thick highways.

ant_runout_150.name: ant_runout_150
ant_runout_150.desc: Runout 150: short trails (fade before bridging nest<->food).

ant_runout_300.name: ant_runout_300
ant_runout_300.desc: Runout 300: trails bridge most of the gap.

ant_rate_2.name: ant_rate_2
ant_rate_2.desc: Deposit rate 2: faint trails, weaker recruitment.

ant_rate_8.name: ant_rate_8
ant_rate_8.desc: Deposit rate 8: strong trails, fast lock-in.

ant_food1.name: ant_food1
ant_food1.desc: One food disc: a single dominant trail.

ant_food2.name: ant_food2
ant_food2.desc: Two food discs: two competing trails.

ant_many_food.name: ant_many_food
ant_many_food.desc: Five scattered sources: several trails coexist.

ant_perc_04.name: ant_perc_04
ant_perc_04.desc: Perception 0.04: tiny homing radius -> more wandering near goals.

ant_perc_14.name: ant_perc_14
ant_perc_14.desc: Perception 0.14: large homing radius -> snappy pickups/dropoffs.

ant_highway.name: ant_highway
ant_highway.desc: Highway: side nest -> one food across the arena; one strong trail.

ant_wall.name: ant_wall
ant_wall.desc: Wall: a barrier with one gap between nest and food; trail routes through it.

ant_maze.name: ant_maze
ant_maze.desc: Maze: a barrier with two gaps; the colony commits to a route.

ant_depleting.name: ant_depleting
ant_depleting.desc: Depleting food: each source holds 80 units; trails shift as food runs out.

ant_no_trail.name: ant_no_trail
ant_no_trail.desc: Ablation: trail-following off (turn=0) -> no recruitment; chance deliveries only.
